scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read-only streams (tables, documents, collections, questions) only, matching internal/connectors/secoda's exact endpoint set; the full Secoda surface (single-resource fetches, dictionary terms, tags, users, create/update endpoints) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /dictionary is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/tags is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/users is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/tables is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
